zh.lifeSummary: Joan Bodrugan是Otto Bodrugan和Joane Trelausard的女兒，於大約1351年出生在英國可瓦爾聖 恩德利。她於1370年之前與Ralph Trenoweth結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1428年4月12日享年78歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Joan Bodrugan是Otto Bodrugan和Joane Trelausard的女儿，于大约1351年出生在英国可瓦爾聖 恩德利。她于1370年之前与Ralph Trenoweth结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1428年4月12日享年78岁。

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: Joan Bodrugan was born about 1351, in St Endellion, Cornwall, England as the daughter of Otto Bodrugan and Joane Trelausard. She married Ralph Trenoweth before 1370. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 12 April 1428, at the age of 78.

fr.lifeSummary: Joan Bodrugan est née environ 1351, à St Endellion, Cornouailles, Angleterre, fille de Otto Bodrugan et Joane Trelausard. Elle a épousé Ralph Trenoweth avant 1370. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 12 avril 1428, à l’âge de 78 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Joan Bodrugan wurde um 1351 in St Endellion, Cornwall, England, als Tochter von Otto Bodrugan und Joane Trelausard geboren. Sie hat vor 1370 Ralph Trenoweth geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 12. April 1428 im Alter von 78 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Joan Bodrugan è nata il circa 1351 nel St Endellion, Cornwall, England come figlia di Otto Bodrugan e Joane Trelausard. Lei sposato Ralph Trenoweth prima del 1370. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 12 aprile 1428, all'età di 78 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Bodruganは約1351年にイギリスコルンワルスト エンデリオンでOtto BodruganとJoane Trelausardの娘として生まれた。1370年以前にRalph Trenowethと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1428年4月12日に78歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Bodrugan(은)는 대략 1351년 영국 코른월 스트 엔들리언에서 Otto Bodrugan(와)과 Joane Trelausard의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1370년 이전 Ralph Trenoweth(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1428년 4월 12일 78세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Trenouth, Cornwall, England: Trenouth, Kernev, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Joan Bodrugan nasceu aproximadamente 1351, em St Endellion, Cornwall, Inglaterra filha de Otto Bodrugan e Joane Trelausard. Ela casou-se com Ralph Trenoweth antes 1370. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 12 de abril de 1428, com 78 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Joan Bodrugan родилась около 1351 г. в местности ст энделлион, корнвалл, Англия. Её родителей звали Otto Bodrugan и Joane Trelausard. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ralph Trenoweth перед 1370 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 12 апреля 1428 г. в возрасте 78 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Joan Bodrugan nació aproximadamente 1351, en St Endellion, Cornwall, Inglaterra como hija de Otto Bodrugan y Joane Trelausard. Se casó con Ralph Trenoweth antes de 1370. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 12 de abril de 1428, a la edad de 78 años.
